testcase.name: Integration • Database sanity > confirms seeded health record exists
Integration • Database sanity > confirms baseline customer data
Integration • Household Finance > generates a recurring paid expense once and leaves the source idempotent on rerun
Integration • Household Finance > creates a pending recurring expense without decrementing the linked account balance
Integration • Data integrity safeguards > updates transaction records without altering total rows
Integration • Data integrity safeguards > soft deletes mark rows instead of removing them
Integration • Data integrity safeguards > shipment updates preserve row counts
Integration • Data integrity safeguards > updates GM transaction records without altering total rows
Integration • Data integrity safeguards > soft deletes GM rows by marking deletedAt instead of removing them
